description: Write a Python script within Blender to visualize exoplanet data from '/home/ga/Desktop/exoplanets.csv' (columns: id, x, y, z, radius, habitable). For each record, create a UV Sphere named 'Planet_{id}' at the specified (x, y, z) coordinates, scaled uniformly by a factor of 0.2 relative to the radius. Apply a green material (approx RGB 0,1,0) to spheres where 'habitable' is 'Yes' and a red material (approx RGB 1,0,0) where it is 'No'. All spheres must be placed within a collection named 'StarCluster'. Save the resulting project to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/exoplanet_viz.blend'.
